_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: 49% reduction in the numbers of Iba1-positive microglia...GCV-mediated microglia ablation reduced optic glioma proliferation (Ki67-positive staining), by 94%
details: GCV treatment resulted in 49% reduction in Iba1-positive microglia numbers and 94% reduction in optic glioma proliferation in established tumors
